text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're now halfway through our summer training camp, and Mejiro
Ardan's making good progress. One day, as we head out to start our
afternoon session...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now then, shall we begi—hm?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you two! Do you have any plans tonight? We're holding a test of
courage! You guys should totally come!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A test of courage? That's where you explore a scary location, yes?
I've heard about them, but I've never actually joined.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a second, be more considerate! You don't want to pressure
her... Ardan, we understand if you can't come because of your health.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well... I appreciate the concern. I'm personally feeling well enough to
attend, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be worried about alarming the other participants and event
planners. But if she says she's healthy, I don't see why she shouldn't
join.
choice_data_list: I say we do it. Besides, I'll be there just in case.
I say we do it. Besides, I'll be there just in case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
All right, but we'll understand if you can't make it in the end. Or if you
have to leave halfway through!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish our day of training and head to where the test of courage is
being held.

text_block_list.name: Ghastly Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Boooo!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Aaaaahhh! Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the darkness ahead, we can hear the screams of other people
braving the test of courage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it? I'm getting chills just thinking about it. Now then, it's our
turn.

text_block_list.name: Ghastly Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Boo—Ardan?! S-sorry, I didn't scare you, did I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Not at all. Thank you for your concern.

text_block_list.name: Ghastly Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Beware... Bewaaare... Beware the bumps in the road, Ardan. We don't
want you to trip and fall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, I'll keep an eye out. And please do watch out for bug
bites yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we continue on, it's clear the people playing the monsters and
ghosts are going easy on Ardan for her sake. I wonder if Ardan is
enjoying herself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Who knew a test of courage could be so delightful?
Everyone's having so much fun. I'm glad we were invited.
choice_data_list: Good to see you're having fun.
Good to see you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Of course I am. After all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We're just like those two knights in that play, seeking glory by
hunting down ghosts.

text_block_list.name: Knight A
text_block_list.text:
My friend, do my eyes deceive me? Is that not the accursed castle,
said to only appear at dusk? What a foreboding atmosphere...

text_block_list.name: Knights
text_block_list.text: A g-g-g-g-ghost?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now that she mentions it... Despite the fact that the play was a comedy, the premise itself is kinda creepy...
choice_data_list: H-haha... Is it chilly in here or is it just... me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No response. I look over to my side and realize Ardan is gone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried that I accidentally left her behind, I whip my head around,
but still no sign of her...
Wah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hehe... Ehehe! I wasn't expecting you to scream like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... My apologies for scaring you. I simply couldn't help
myself—pretending to be a ghost just looked like so much fun. I had
to try it for myself.
choice_data_list: Just you wait—vengeance will be mine!
Just you wait—vengeance will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh? I'm looking forward to it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What a worthwhile experience. Although it's a shame we didn't find
any real ghosts or castles.
choice_data_list: I also never got my revenge...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it'll take more than hiding around the corner and loud noises to
scare me. Still, it was fun waiting to see what you'd come up with
next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It felt like I was back to being a child again... I just feel so at ease
when I'm with you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: Tired? We can take a break.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, I'm fi—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Actually... Do you mind if we rest for a while?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We have training tomorrow, correct? What... will the regimen look like? We have been out rather late...
choice_data_list: Oh, we're going hard at practice tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I am. More than you could ever imagine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad to have someone who understands me... Understands that
I want to do as much as I can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's so... reassuring. I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Do you remember when you told me it's okay to do what I
want sometimes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I promised you I wouldn't overdo it, correct? I assure you, I
am fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All right, but remember, it's okay to do what you want sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All right, but remember, it's okay to do what you want sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You said I could relax more, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Then, could I... rest my head on your shoulders? The sound of the
waves is just so... soothing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(What a lovely sound... I could fall asleep just like this. In fact, I just
might. Trainer wouldn't mind.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer... you're like a steady tree. I know if I ever need to rest, you'll
be there for me to lean on.)
